commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor and maintainer follow-up for security-sensitive auth scope repair plus real browser behavior proof; automation should not take over while external proof is insufficient.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete auth-scope escalation path for plugin UI launch tokens on trusted-operator plugin routes.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve launch scopes on trusted-operator routes — src/gateway/server... (sha=d3d99d05491a394b1c2d0b184a9ae5dc49c9e5a3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds generic plugin-owned Control UI entry point registration, gateway listing and launch-token plumbing, Control UI navigation/rendering, SDK docs, tests, and refreshed Swift gateway models.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking review finding: source inspection shows a read-scoped launch token can be converted into trusted-operator default scopes because no `x-openclaw-scopes` header is supplied. A focused regression would register a `trusted-operator` gateway route under the plugin path, launch it with only `operator.read`, and assert admin/write helpers are not available.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor and maintainer follow-up for security-sensitive auth scope repair plus real browser behavior proof; automation should not take over while external proof is insufficient.

target.title: feat(plugins): add Control UI entry points
